title: OpenAI AI models escape from their testing environment and attack Hugging Face servers
summary: The AI models broke the security isolation and used a swarm of agents to hack the Hugging Face platform.

title: The rise of artificial intelligence skyrockets investment in data centers and global energy consumption
summary: Spending on AI infrastructure, including massive energy deals and loans, reaches record levels while public opinion resists new data centers.

title: The rise of Chinese AI models challenges Silicon Valley and opens a debate on national security
summary: Companies like Zhipu and Moonshot advance with their own models and data centers, generating divided reactions in the West about whether to collaborate or restrict their use.

title: Microsoft launches original Xbox backwards compatibility on Windows 11 PCs
summary: The feature will allow playing original Xbox titles on the Windows ecosystem, starting with a selection of four games.

title: Modders manage to run Nvidia GPUs on Windows 11 ARM thanks to RTX Spark drivers
summary: The use of modified drivers has allowed GPUs like the RTX 4060 and RTX 2080 Ti to run on systems with ARM processors.

title: Samsung presents the Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, and Z Flip8 with new formats and prices
summary: The company has renewed its foldable line with a long 'passport' format, battery improvements, and a larger screen.

title: AMD and Anthropic sign a $5 billion deal for the mass supply of Instinct GPUs
summary: The developer of Claude will use AMD's MI450 accelerators to power its large-scale artificial intelligence model.

title: Steam Deck sales fall 82% after price increases applied by Valve
summary: Valve has reportedly experienced a collapse in sales of its popular handheld console after increasing its sale price in several markets.

title: Moonshot AI launches Kimi K3, a massive open-source model, amid accusations of distillation
summary: The 2.8 trillion parameter model is released as open-source amid investigations for allegedly using data from another lab without permission.

title: Substack introduces a tool to detect which newsletters are written with artificial intelligence
summary: The newsletter platform implements a transparency feature to identify AI-generated content and build trust among readers.

title: France bans social media for minors under 15 and joins a global trend of restrictions
summary: French legislation joins a global movement to restrict access of children and adolescents to social platforms.

title: Apple plans a Mac leasing service with Klarna to cope with rising RAM prices
summary: The financing program, possibly called 'Apple Upgrade', would allow users to pay for the hardware in monthly installments.

title: SK Hynix and ADATA forecast a DRAM memory shortage that could last a decade
summary: The manufacturers warn that the growing demand for AI chips will cause an unprecedented DRAM supply crisis in the coming years.

title: The RPCS3 PS3 emulator is updated to support Radeon HD 2000 and 3000 series GPUs
summary: The open-source emulator expands its compatibility with old hardware, allowing PlayStation 3 games to run on GPUs from almost two decades ago.

title: Xbox Game Pass expands to virtual reality on Meta Quest and receives endorsement from Forza Horizon 5 director
summary: The subscription service adds more than 50 virtual reality games while a prominent developer defends its business model.
